shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation on feature cards. Barely perceptible.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Hover elevation on pillar cards, applied alongside translateY(-2px).

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Button hover, card hover. Quick feedback.

motion.name: card-rise
motion.purpose: Pillar card hover: translateY(-2px) + shadow-lifted together.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Hero collapses to single column; pillar and feature grids reflow to 2 columns.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: All grids collapse to 1 column; trust strip stacks vertically; CTA stacks.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary conversion action. Download / Get the App.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1C355E; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1C355E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Gold Button
components.description: High-emphasis secondary CTA. Used on navy backgrounds only.
components.css: .ds-btn-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #E8B76D; color: #1C355E; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-gold:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-gold:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8B76D; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action adjacent to a Primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #1C355E; padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; border: 2px solid #1C355E; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #F8F6F1; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1C355E; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Pillar Card
components.description: Clickable feature category card. Four per grid.
components.html:
🏠

Household Staff

Track maids, cooks, drivers, and more.

Learn more →
components.css: .ds-pillar-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; background: #F8F6F1; border: 1px solid #E3D5BF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px 20px; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out, transform 150ms ease-out; } .ds-pillar-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(28,53,94,.12); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-pillar-icon { font-size: 32px; } .ds-pillar-card h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #1C355E; margin: 0; } .ds-pillar-card p { font-size: 14px; color: #5a6070; margin: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-pillar-link { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #1C355E; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Informational USP card. Six per grid. Not interactive.
components.html:
🔐

Privacy First

All data lives on your device. No servers, no cloud, no tracking.
components.css: .ds-feature-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E3D5BF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 28px 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(28,53,94,.08); } .ds-feature-icon { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 12px; display: block; } .ds-feature-card h3 { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #1C355E; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-feature-card p { font-size: 14px; color: #5a6070; margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

narrative.overview:
AttendAssist's visual language is the design equivalent of a trusted, competent friend who manages their household and small operation without fuss. The interface communicates specificity over generality: not 'manage your team' but 'track your cook, your driver, your tenants.' The warmth comes from a cream-inflected neutral palette that echoes paper registers while the deep navy gives it professional authority. Gold appears sparingly, as an accent that rewards attention rather than demands it.

The atmosphere is calm and deliberate. Sections breathe. Typography is confident without being loud. The most important element on any given screen is obvious without needing to shout. The system rejects the enterprise grey of HR software and the animated-gradient performativity of SaaS landing pages. It rejects, too, the celebration-confetti energy of consumer fintech.
keyCharacteristics: Gold as a statement accent, never a fill
Poppins at four weights: hierarchy through contrast, not decoration
Cards that feel substantial, not lightweight
Section rhythm at 80px; hero at 72px top
Shadows tinted to the navy hue, never neutral grey

rules.name: The Brass Rule
rules.body: Warm Brass Accent (#E8B76D) appears in at most two contexts per screen. Its rarity makes the presence count. Never use it as a section background fill.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Neutral Rule
rules.body: No #000, no #fff, no #808080. Every neutral is tinted toward the navy hue.

rules.name: The One-Typeface Rule
rules.body: Poppins is the only font on this surface. Hierarchy is earned through weight contrast and scale, not competing type families.

rules.name: The State-Driven Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear as responses to interaction state (hover, active) or structural necessity (sticky nav). Resting surfaces are flat or tonal.

dos: Use Warm Parchment (#F8F6F1) to alternate section backgrounds instead of line dividers
Tint every shadow toward navy rgba(28,53,94,...) not gray rgba(0,0,0,...)
Use specific use-case nouns: 'Track your maid's attendance,' not 'Manage your staff'
State offline, no account, free plainly without asterisks or softening
Reserve the gold CTA button for the final conversion moments
Support prefers-reduced-motion: disable transforms and transitions
donts: Don't use blob gradients, background gradient fills, or glassmorphism beyond the nav blur
Don't use grey-on-grey enterprise palettes or compliance-heavy copy language
Don't use border-left or border-right accents greater than 1px as colored stripes on cards
Don't stack navy and gold CTA buttons on the same screen region
Don't add celebration language, confetti, or neon accent colors
